narrative.headline: 2022 Subaru Crosstrek: visibility and windshield top the owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 28 complaints with NHTSA. Visibility/Wiper is the most reported area at 21%, followed by a three-way tie among the electrical system, service brakes, and forward collision avoidance at 14% each. No fires, injuries, or deaths are reported. The engine draws the fewest complaints but the most crashes (2) of any area, and the brakes account for 1 more, so the driveline is worth a close look on a test drive.

issues.title: Visibility/Wiper
issues.blurb: The most reported area: 6 reports (21%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. Owners describe windshield cracking; inspect the glass closely.
